title: Event
description: Substrate hook event — fired on SessionStart/SessionEnd/PreToolUse/PostToolUse by the unified hook dispatcher (agency/engine.py; Spec 076 + Spec 153 Slice 6 workflow-spine coverage). Links IN_SESSION→Session and OBSERVED_DURING→Intent.

session.description: Session ID the event belongs to ('unknown' when no session context).

tool.description: Tool name for tool-lifecycle events (Write/Edit/Bash/…). Absent for session-level events.

summary.description: Token-bounded head of the tool payload (head:5 filter, max 500 chars). Absent for session-level events.
